MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT THE CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF CORRECTIONS AND REHABILITATION'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Jeremy Pasternak, Esq. of Law Offices of Jeremy Paternak 693-0300 for pltf & opposing party; Courtney S. Lui, Deputy Atty General 510/622-2115 for deft & moving party.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - Defendants' demurrer to the first amended complaint is overruled. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
